Egan Storage Conditions for 1/25/2026


Notice Text:

The following restriction will be in place on the Egan Hub Storage (Egan) for Gas Day, January 25, 2026:

Egan has restricted excess withdrawal nominations. No increases in withdrawals will be accepted.

Egan has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations and IWS activity at meter 45101 - ANR - STORAGE, LA (D40102/R40101). No increases in withdrawals or IWS activity will be accepted to meter 45101 - ANR - STORAGE, LA (D40102/R40101) except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Egan has scheduled and sealed injection nomination from meter 45113 - FGT-STORAGE, LA (D40114/R40113). No increases in injections will be accepted except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.



BackPrint
